_doc: Canonical model routing config. SOURCE OF TRUTH. Read by lib/ai/model-router.ts. The model_routing block in gabriel-config.json is DEPRECATED and should not be used.
_provider_split: Claude (Anthropic) is the primary reasoning core. OpenAI is reserved for bulk dedup/classification where Haiku is overkill.

content_generation.reason: Brand voice, compliance, conversion — Sonnet matches Opus on copywriting at 1/5 the cost

content_variants.reason: Conversion-optimized 3-variant generation with honest scoring — needs Opus reasoning

lead_scoring.reason: Deterministic scoring — Haiku is fast, cheap, and accurate for structured judgment

outreach_drafts.reason: Personalized but short — Sonnet matches voice better than Haiku, cheaper than Opus

seo_synthesis.reason: Strategic reasoning across keywords, SERPs, competitive gaps — Opus territory

daily_report.reason: Summarization of daily run data — Haiku is sufficient

routing_decisions.reason: Planner routing logic — Haiku is fast and structured

qa_review.reason: Structured 10-point checklist review — Haiku is the right tool

self_audit.reason: Semantic analysis of code quality across the whole agent stack — Opus territory

campaign_strategy.reason: Multi-step strategic planning across content, offer, audience, channel

compliance_review.reason: Compliance work demands the strongest reasoning — Opus only

agent_planner.reason: Hermes orchestrator picks agents, builds handoffs — Opus reasoning required

video_script.reason: Video scripts need voice + structure — Sonnet handles both

dedup_categorization.reason: Bulk dedup and categorization where token cost dominates and reasoning is trivial

fallback_strategy._doc: If Claude API is down or rate-limited, fall back to these OpenAI equivalents. Only used after 3 retries on Anthropic.
